protection.title: Select Water Protection Level

intro.p1: Heavy rainfall may cause an accumulation of water in a very short time, but it seldom exceeds a water level of more than half a meter. The situation is different if you have an underground garage — the sunken driveway acts like a funnel and quickly fills up beyond a height of 500 mm, creating pressure that only a reinforced door can withstand for longer periods.
intro.p2: The AquaLOCK® up-and-over garage doors ensure protection up to 1,600 mm, depending on the height of the door. If your garage door is between 3,100 mm and 5,200 mm wide, we recommend the V500 version, which is limited to a protection height of 500 mm.

protection.note500: For doors from 3,100 mm width, manual locking must be closed to achieve full protection. Maximum width is 5,200 mm.

upTo500.label: Protection height up to 500 mm
upTo500.description: Manual locking devices are used in addition to the operating pressure for a safety height of up to 500 mm.

over500.label: Protection height over 500 mm
over500.description: At a safety height of over 500 mm, the door is maintained firmly latched by the pressure of the special garage door drive.

dimensions.title: Garage Door Size
dimensions.widthInfo: Width of the wall opening: between 2,200 and 5,200 mm.
dimensions.heightInfo: Height of the wall opening: between 1,920 and 2,520 mm
dimensions.invalid: Please enter a valid size within the allowed range.

installation.title: Installation Type
installation.description: No worries if you are not sure which type of installation is appropriate for your building - an experienced fitter will clarify this on site.

color.title: Choose Color
color.description: 216 colors to choose from. You have a choice of 216 RAL colors to give your AquaLOCK® garage door the perfect look for your building. This includes seven standard colors (white and 6 shades of grey), which are available at no extra charges. Please note: The display of colors on the website may differ from the actual color due to the monitor display. Specifications are therefore without guarantee.
color.standardNotice: This is a standard colour and carries no extra charge.
color.customNotice: Selected colour is a non-standard RAL colour and incurs an extra charge of €{amount}.

material.title: Material
material.name: Galvanized Steel
material.description: Galvanized steel is the only available material option for the AquaLOCK® garage door at the moment. As a rule, galvanizing is completely sufficient for rust protection, especially as each door is also primed and painted. We give a 5-year guarantee against rusting through.

included.title: Included by default
included.description: For this door configuration, the following items are automatically included and added to the total price.

insulation.title: Cladding & Insulation
insulation.description: The inside of the door is lined with smooth aluminum sheet metal...

casingNoInsulation.label: With cladding but without insulation
casingNoInsulation.description: Casing installed but no additional insulation.

full.label: With cladding and insulation
full.description: Complete casing with added insulation for maximum efficiency.

transmitters.title: Hand-held Transmitters
transmitters.question: How many radio hand-held transmitters do you need for your AquaLOCK® garage door?
transmitters.label: Number of hand-held transmitters

glazing.title: Choose Glazing
glazing.autoNote: Automatically calculated as door width - 370 mm. Quantity: 1 piece.
